title: Transmission with integrated overload protection for a legged robot
abstract: An example robot (300) includes: a motor (1300) disposed at a joint (403) configured to control motion of a member of the robot; a transmission (1200) including an input member (1312) coupled to and configured to rotate with the motor, an intermediate member (1314), and an output member (1318), where the intermediate member is fixed such that as the input member rotates, the output member rotates therewith at a different speed; a pad (1320) frictionally coupled to a side surface of the output member of the transmission and coupled to the member of the robot; and a spring (1328) configured to apply an axial preload on the pad, wherein the axial preload defines a torque limit that, when exceeded by a torque load on the member of the robot, the output member of the transmission slips relative to the pad.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A robot (300) comprising: a motor (1300) disposed at a joint (403) configured to control motion of a member of the robot (300); a transmission (1200) including an input member (1312) coupled to and configured to rotate with the motor (1300), an intermediate member (1314), and an output member (1318), wherein the input member (1312) is configured to engage the intermediate member (1314) and rotate within an open annular space defined by the intermediate member (1314), wherein the intermediate member (1314) engages the output member (1318), and wherein the intermediate member (1314) is fixed such that as the input member (1312) rotates, the output member (1318) rotates therewith at a different speed; a pad (1320) frictionally coupled to a side surface of the output member (1318) of the transmission (1200) and coupled to the member of the robot (300); and a spring (1328) configured to apply an axial preload on the pad, wherein the axial preload defines a torque limit that, when exceeded by a torque load on the member of the robot (300), the output member (1318) of the transmission (1200) slips relative to the pad. 2. The robot (300) of claim 1, wherein the pad (1320) is a first pad (1320) frictionally coupled to a distal side surface of the output member (1318) of the transmission, the robot (300) further comprising a second pad (1322) frictionally coupled to a proximal side surface of the output member (1318). 3. The robot (300) of claim 2, wherein the second pad (1322) is coupled to a presser plate (1324), which is coupled to the member of the robot (300). 4. The robot (300) of any of claims 1-3, further comprising a constraint ring (1334) coupled to the member of the robot (300), wherein the output member (1318) of the transmission (1200) is mounted within an open annular space defined by the constraint ring (1334). 5. The robot (300) claim 4, further comprising a constraint bushing (1340) mounted between the constraint ring (1334) and the output member (1318) of the transmission (1200), such that an exterior peripheral surface of the constraint bushing (1340) interfaces with an interior peripheral surface of the constraint ring (1334), and an interior peripheral surface of the constraint bushing (1340) interfaces with an exterior peripheral surface of the output member (1318) of the transmission (1200). 6. The robot (300) of claim 5, wherein the constraint bushing (1340) is made of a plastic material. 7. The robot (300) of any of claims 1-6, further comprising an output flexure (1326) member disposed between and interfacing with the pad (1320) and the spring (1328), wherein the output flexure (1326) member is coupled to the member of the robot (300), and wherein the output flexure (1326) is torsionally stiff and axially flexible. 8. The robot (300) of any of claims 1-7, wherein the pad (1320) defines an open annular space, the robot (300) further comprising an O-ring (1338A) mounted within the open annular space defined by the pad (1320). 9. The robot (300) of any of claims 1-8, wherein the input member is elliptically shaped and configured to cause the intermediate member (1314) to deform as the input member (1312) rotates, wherein the intermediate member (1314) is configured to have external teeth (1212) disposed on an external peripheral surface thereof, wherein the output member (1318) is configured to have internal teeth (1214) disposed on an interior peripheral surface thereof and configured to engage the external teeth (1212) of the intermediate member (1314). 10. The robot (300) of claim 9, further comprising a torque sensor (1316) mounted to a housing (1302) of the motor (1300), wherein the intermediate member (1314) includes a thin-walled cylinder, wherein the external teeth (1212) are formed circumferentially on 

 a first portion of an outer surface of the thin-walled cylinder, and wherein a second portion of the thin-walled cylinder is coupled to the torque sensor (1316). 11. An assembly (1500) comprising: 5 a motor (1300) disposed at a joint (403) configured to control motion of a member of a robot (300); a harmonic drive (1200) comprising a wave generator (1312) coupled to and configured to rotate with the motor (1300), a flexspline (1314), and a circular spline (1318), wherein the flexspline (1314) is fixed such that as the wave generator (1312) o rotates, the circular spline (1318) rotates therewith at a different speed; a first pad (1320) frictionally coupled to a distal side surface of the circular spline (1318) and coupled to the member of the robot (300); a second pad (1322) frictionally coupled to a proximal side surface of the circular spline (1318); and 5 a compliant member configured to apply an axial preload on the first and second pads, wherein the axial preload defines a torque limit that, when exceeded by a torque load on the member of the robot (300), the circular spline (1318) slips relative to at least one of the first or second pads (1320, 1322). 0 12. The assembly (1500) of claim 11, wherein the second pad (1322) is coupled to a presser plate (1324), which is coupled to the member of the robot (300). 13. The assembly (1500) of claim 12, further comprising a constraint ring (1334) coupled to the member of the robot (300), wherein the circular spline (1318) and the first5 and second pads (1320, 1322) frictionally coupled thereto are mounted within an open annular space defined by the constraint ring (1334), and wherein the presser plate (1324) is coupled to the member of the robot (300) by a radial array of bolts (1335A, 1335B) that couple the presser plate (1324) to the constraint ring (1334). 0 14. The assembly (1500) claim 13, further comprising a constraint bushing (1340) mounted between the constraint ring (1334) and the circular spline (1318), such that an 

 exterior peripheral surface of the constraint bushing (1340) interfaces with an interior peripheral surface of the constraint ring (1334), and an interior peripheral surface of the constraint bushing (1340) interfaces with an exterior peripheral surface of the circular spline (1318). 5 15. The assembly (1500) of claim 14, wherein the constraint bushing (1340) is made of a plastic material. 16. The assembly (1500) of any of claims 12-15, further comprising a cross-roller o bearing (1336) mounted between an exterior peripheral surface of the constraint ring (1334) and an interior surface of a housing (1302) of the motor (1300). 17. The assembly (1500) of any of claims 11-16, further comprising an output flexure member (1326) disposed between and interfacing with the first pad (1320) and the 5 compliant member, wherein the output flexure member (1326) is coupled to the member of the robot (300). 18. The assembly (1500) of any of claims 11-17, wherein the first pad (1320) defines a first open annular space and the second pad (1322) defines a second open annular 0 space, the robot (300) further comprising: a first O-ring (1338A) mounted within the first open annular space defined by the first pad (1320); and a second O-ring (1338B) mounted within the second open annular space defined by the second pad (1322). 5 19. The assembly (1500) of any of claims 11-18, further comprising a torque sensor (1316) mounted to a housing (1302) of the motor (1300), wherein the flexspline (1314) includes a thin-walled cylinder, wherein external teeth (1212) of the flexspline (1314) are formed circumferentially on a portion of an outer surface of the thin-walled cylinder,0 wherein another portion of the thin-walled is coupled to the torque sensor (1316). 20. The assembly (1500) of any of claims 11-19, wherein the compliant member comprises a Belleville spring (1328)
